description.value:
Nomad access 3.

Haulers are an alternative to generic compacts. They're specially designed trucks that take advantage of the higher performance of CHOOH2 to haul cargo, and have mostly replaced conventional 18-wheelers across the world for being smaller, easier to maintain and less fuel intensive. Haulers are the only generic vehicles capable of hauling other vehicles, either on a trailer or through a hitch, and their high durability makes them heavily in demand.

2 seats, 70 HP; capable of pulling trailers loaded with virtually anything that someone can actually manage to fit on one. 60,000eb (Super Luxury) item. 20 MOVE / 100 MPH / 161 KPH narrative move. The passengers are elevanted; add 5 M/yds to any ranges targeting them to reflect a difficulty to hit.

Tokens and Art by reddragon8928 on Discord. Redistributed with permission.
